verses.2: I will get up now, and go about the city;
verses.3: The watchmen who go about the city found me;
verses.4: I had scarcely passed from them,
verses.5: I adjure you, daughters of Jerusalem,
verses.6: Who is this who comes up from the wilderness like pillars of smoke,
verses.8: They all handle the sword, and are expert in war.
verses.9: King Solomon made himself a carriage
verses.10: He made its pillars of silver,
verses.11: Go out, you daughters of Zion, and see King Solomon,
